problems.title: Print Hello World
problems.instructions:
Write a C program that prints the following line exactly.

```
Hello, World!
```

Your program should output the text followed by a newline.

{hints: Use printf from stdio.h.}

problems.title: Print Two Lines
problems.instructions:
Write a program that prints two lines exactly like this:

```
C programming
is fun
```

Each line must end with a newline character.

{hints: Call printf twice.}

problems.title: Print a Number
problems.instructions:
Print the number **42**.

The output must look like this:

```
42
```

{hints: printf can print integers with %d.}

problems.title: Read and Print an Integer
problems.instructions:
Read an integer from standard input and print it.

Example:

Input: 7

Output:
```
7
```

{hints: Use scanf with %d.}

problems.title: Add Two Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print their sum.

Example:

Input: 3 4

Output:
```
7
```

{hints: store numbers in variables and add them.}

problems.title: Subtract Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print the result of **a - b**.

Example:

Input: 10 4

Output:
```
6
```

problems.title: Multiply Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print their product.

Example output:

```
12
```

problems.title: Divide Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print **a / b** using integer division.

Example:

Input: 8 2

Output:
```
4
```

problems.title: Print Square
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print its square.

Example:

Input: 5

Output:
```
25
```

problems.title: Check Even or Odd
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print **even** or **odd**.

Example:

Input: 6

Output:
```
even
```

problems.title: Maximum of Two Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print the **larger** one.

Example:

Input: 3 9

Output:
```
9
```

problems.title: Print Numbers 1 to 5
problems.instructions:
Print the numbers 1 through 5, each on its own line.

Expected output:

```
1
2
3
4
5
```

problems.title: Sum of Three Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read three integers and print their sum.

Example:

Input: 1 2 3

Output:
```
6
```

problems.title: Print Absolute Value
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print its **absolute value**.

Example:

Input: -5

Output:
```
5
```

problems.title: Sum 1 to N
problems.instructions:
Read an integer **n** and print the sum from **1 to n**.

Example:

Input: 5

Output:
```
15
```

problems.title: Count Characters
problems.instructions:
Read a single word and print the number of characters in it.

Example:

Input: hello

Output:
```
5
```

problems.title: Reverse Two Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print them in reverse order.

Example:

Input: 3 8

Output:
```
8 3
```

problems.title: Factorial
problems.instructions:
Read an integer **n** and print **n!**.

Example:

Input: 5

Output:
```
120
```

problems.title: Count to N
problems.instructions:
Read **n** and print numbers from 1 to n separated by spaces.

Example:

Input: 4

Output:
```
1 2 3 4
```

problems.title: Maximum of Three
problems.instructions:
Read three integers and print the largest.

Example:

Input: 2 9 5

Output:
```
9
```

problems.title: Sum Array
problems.instructions:
Read an integer **n**, then **n numbers**, and print their sum.

Example:

Input:

```
3
1 2 3
```

Output:

```
6
```

problems.title: Count Even Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read **n** numbers and print how many are even.

Example:

Input:

```
4
1 2 3 4
```

Output:

```
2
```

problems.title: Reverse Digits
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print its digits reversed.

Example:

Input: 123

Output:
```
321
```

problems.title: Simple Power
problems.instructions:
Read integers **a** and **b** and compute **a^b**.

Example:

Input: 2 3

Output:
```
8
```

problems.title: Average of Numbers
problems.instructions:
Read **n numbers** and print their integer average.

Example:

Input:

```
3
3 3 3
```

Output:

```
3
```

problems.title: Prime Check
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print **prime** if it is prime, otherwise print **not prime**.

Example:

Input: 7

Output:
```
prime
```

problems.title: GCD
problems.instructions:
Read two integers and print their **greatest common divisor**.

Example:

Input: 12 18

Output:
```
6
```

problems.title: Fibonacci
problems.instructions:
Read **n** and print the **nth Fibonacci number**.

Example:

Input: 7

Output:
```
13
```

problems.title: Palindrome Number
problems.instructions:
Check if an integer reads the same forwards and backwards.

Example:

Input: 121

Output:
```
yes
```

problems.title: Count Digits
problems.instructions:
Read an integer and print the number of digits.

Example:

Input: 12345

Output:
```
5
```

problems.title: Binary to Decimal
problems.instructions:
Read a binary number and convert it to decimal.

Example:

Input: 101

Output:
```
5
```

problems.title: Decimal to Binary
problems.instructions:
Read a decimal number and print its binary representation.

Example:

Input: 5

Output:
```
101
```

problems.title: Bubble Sort
problems.instructions:
Read **n numbers** and print them sorted in ascending order.

Example:

Input:

```
5
5 3 1 4 2
```

Output:

```
1 2 3 4 5
```

problems.title: Matrix Sum
problems.instructions:
Read a **2x2 matrix** and print the sum of all elements.

Example:

Input:

```
1 2
3 4
```

Output:

```
10
```

problems.title: String Reverse
problems.instructions:
Read a word and print it reversed.

Example:

Input: code

Output:
```
edoc
```
